safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (ca/on/mto/vehicle-registration). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to MTO, ServiceOntario, or any government system, and the registrant/vehicle/insurance details above are fabricated examples, not a real person or vehicle — this transaction is completed in person at a ServiceOntario Issuing Office, so this schema's author did not attempt to exercise a live counter transaction (see VERIFICATION.md). A human (the registrant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and bring the completed form and supporting documents to an Issuing Office themselves before this application is submitted. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
